exercises.prompt: Write the dimensional formula for: (1) acceleration  (2) force  (3) work/energy. (Hint: start with definitions)
exercises.solution: (1) acceleration = [LT⁻²] (2) force = [MLT⁻²] (3) work = [ML²T⁻²]. Start with definitions: a = v/t, F = ma, W = Fd. Combine units!

exercises.prompt: What physical quantity has dimensional formula [M L T⁻²]? What about [M L² T⁻²]?
exercises.solution: (1) acceleration = [LT⁻²] (2) force = [MLT⁻²] (3) work = [ML²T⁻²]. Start with definitions: a = v/t, F = ma, W = Fd. Combine units!
hints: Think about what base units go together
